# Cagey — Free Daily Cage Puzzle Game

> A daily math puzzle game with progressive KenKen-style rules.

Cagey is a free browser-based puzzle game at https://playcagey.com where players fill cages with numbers so they add, subtract, multiply, or divide to hit a target value.

## Game Rules

- Fill each cage so the numbers combine to the target using the shown operation (+, ×, −, ÷)
- Easy (4×4): Addition only, no row/column rules
- Medium (5×5): Addition and multiplication, each number appears once per row
- Hard (6×6): All four operations, each number appears once per row and column
- Expert (8×8): All four operations, full row and column uniqueness

## Features

- New daily puzzle every day (same puzzle for all players)
- Four difficulty levels with progressive rules
- Leaderboard with daily and all-time rankings
- Hint system, undo support, streak tracking
- Sound effects and responsive design (mobile + desktop)
- No account required, free to play

## About

Created by Jungho Cho. Built with Vanilla JavaScript, no frameworks.
Puzzle generation uses backtracking solver with Latin square verification.
